title: The Heroine scales from opponent cemetery creatures

card.rawText: For every creature in your opponents' cemetery add: Atk Dice Rolls: +1. Modifier: +1.

effect.value: Atk Dice Rolls +1; Modifier +1 per creature

plan.title: The Heroine scales from opponent cemetery creatures
plan.summary: Move one opponent creature to the cemetery and verify The Heroine gains one attack die and one modifier.

notes: Set The Heroine as player_1 primary.
Move one opponent creature to player_2 cemetery for the opponent cemetery count.

steps: Set The Heroine as player_1 primary creature.
Move one player_2 creature to player_2 cemetery.
Read The Heroine's effective attack dice and modifier.

expectedAssertions.label: One opponent cemetery creature adds one attack die
One opponent cemetery creature adds one modifier

manualVerification: Confirm each additional opponent cemetery creature adds another Atk Dice Roll and Modifier.
riskNotes: This fixture covers the positive one-creature count path, not cemetery count changes during an active battle.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate The Heroine opponent cemetery scaling.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
